NAME: GRCh37.p13
FULL NAME: Genome Reference Consortium Human Build 37 patch release 13
KEYWORDS: GRCh37; GRC; NCBI; reference assembly; patch 13
DESCRIPTION: NCBI/GRC human assembly build 37, patch 13 (GCF_000001405.25): the authoritative GRCh37 patch-level reference used for stable accessioning and alignment. Distinct from UCSC hg19/Broad b37 contig naming; always verify chromosome naming and inclusion of ALT/patch contigs when mixing resources.
CITATION: Genome Reference Consortium. Human genome assembly GRCh37.p13 (GCF_000001405.25). National Center for Biotechnology Information.
